pages.text:
before hurrying back to Birmingham for Tony's hair cut.

__Saturday October 9th.__
	Simon & Eve drove across to Ely Station to pick up Thomas for Robert Upex's 50 birthday party at Chippenham. A super party. We slept on the drive & had breakfast in the sunshine outside.
	Bantam Chickens, bees & piglets in the nave of Ely Cathedral for a lovely harvest service. A Congolese setting for the Mass which needed dancing, but everyone stood stock still. After a snack in a coffee house, we took Thomas to the station & went home.
